notes: Schedule config for auto-reanalysis. Read by watcher.cjs every minute. All times are Athens local (Europe/Athens).

watchlist.rationale: Greek industrial conglomerate with energy, metals, and infrastructure arms. Direct exposure to elevated oil/gas prices from Iran conflict. ATHEX rally leader.
Greek gaming monopoly with stable cash flows and high dividend yield. Defensive domestic play — resilient to geopolitical shocks. €5.7B market cap.
Greece's largest telecom (Deutsche Telekom subsidiary). Defensive cash-flow compounder, top ATHEX name by market cap. Low geopolitical beta.
Highest operating leverage to rising oil among large-cap E&Ps. Up 58% YTD on Iran war premium. Earnings double when Brent moves $80→$110. Buffett-backed.
Fortress balance sheet energy major. Up 39% YTD, all-time highs, strongest FCF in sector. Battle-tested through oil cycles. Defensive energy anchor.
Second-largest US defense contractor. $95.7B backlog. B-21 Raider first deliveries in 2026. Benefits from NATO 5% GDP defense spending pledge.
Custom AI chip leader with incredible growth trajectory. VMware integration driving software recurring revenue. High-conviction AI infrastructure play.
World's largest chip foundry with best process technology. 25% revenue CAGR through 2029. Monopoly position in advanced node manufacturing.
AI investment cycle leader — Meta AI chatbot has billions of daily users. AI glasses product line in high demand. Strong ad revenue base funds AI capex.
UK's largest defense pure-play. Up 23% YTD, 325% over 5 years. Deep order book, diversified platforms. Space division underappreciated growth engine.
Rolls-Royce turnaround story continues. Up 15% YTD, 95% in 2025. Defense and civil aerospace engines, SMR nuclear. FTSE 100 top performer.
FTSE 250 defense specialist in high-spec, low-competition niches. Record £1.34B order book. P/E 27.9 vs sector avg 34.3 — relative value in defense.
Top-3 FTSE 100 by market cap. Integrated energy major benefiting from Iran war oil premium. Strong buyback program, diversified gas/LNG portfolio.
